**Risk Trigger:** RiskScore ≥13 in Monday CRM

**Monday Item URL:** https://YOUR_WORKSPACE.monday.com/boards/BOARD_ID/pulses/{{ $json.id }}

---

### Mitigation Plan
- [ ] Schedule call with client within 48h
- [ ] Review pricing/proposal adjustments
- [ ] Prepare alternative strategy
- [ ] Escalate to management if unresolved in 72h
- [ ] Update Monday CRM status after review
- [ ] Close this risk entry when mitigated
